pi_items.source: Task instructions require navigating the file system in Blender UI to open a BIM model
Task involves opening an IFC BIM file in Blender to view a 3D model
BIM modeling and viewing is standard in architecture
BIM software and IFC formats are standard in the AEC industry

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for blenderbim_env open_ifc_project task. Verified that the primary data source is the real FZK-Haus sample model (fzk_haus.ifc) downloaded from ifcwiki.org. The task explicitly requests opening the file using the BlenderBIM UI. Discovered that the task is completely defective programmatically because 'verifier.py' is a stub that returns a fixed 'passed: True' dictionary, requiring an external VLM for evaluation.
